files.purpose: Project manifest with Phaser and Vite dependencies plus dev/build scripts.
Vite configuration using relative base path for Azure Static Web Apps.
Single-page app HTML entry mounting the Phaser game.
Azure Static Web Apps routing config with SPA navigation fallback to index.html.
Creates the Phaser game config, registers scenes, enables Arcade Physics with zero gravity, and boots the app.
Singleton-style round/state manager for score, lives, difficulty, sport rotation, and result payload handling.
Centralized keyboard input abstraction for arrow axes plus Z jump and X strike verbs.
Preloads the six locked texture keys from public assets and initializes shared game state.
Title/menu scene that starts the standard sport loop or launches the mash-up via debug key M.
Generic gameplay scene that instantiates the selected controller and level manager, runs the 15-second round timer, global HUD, and win/fail transitions.
Short auto-advance result overlay scene showing win/fail feedback and rolling into the next random sport.
Top-down pickleball player controller handling constrained movement and 500ms paddle hitbox spawning.
Pickleball court, AI serve/return logic, volley counting, kitchen fail rule, and ball physics tuning.
Top-down soccer player controller handling free movement plus 200ms dash-strike hitbox behavior.
Soccer pitch, goal trigger, goalie patrol, heavy ball physics, and win/fail detection.
Mash-up sport definition wiring the pickleball controller to the soccer level manager for debug launch and rotation support.
